name: Rampant Growth
oracle_text: Search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
design_notes: The definitive green ramp spell. Searches library for a basic land and puts it onto the battlefield (not hand), providing true mana acceleration. Being a sorcery prevents instant-speed mana tricks. The land enters tapped to prevent same-turn tempo advantage. Establishes the baseline for 2-mana ramp spells.
